creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
While I can't judge if the problem only occurred after committing http://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=06e8213fe96f7d5b8049667d303155da66907650 (devel/py-qt5-positioning), presumably another update of the port tree to at least https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=77cdc8376926974d383399c8d5db53844a6eaed3 will help ?

If this helps, sorry for the breakage.

Regards,
Rainer
